The research focuses on monitoring environmental factors for agriculture.
The problem of shifting weather patterns affecting the Mekong Delta.
The main agricultural activity being monitored.
Agent-based Environment Monitoring System.
Internet of Things technology used for real-time data collection.

Long-range wireless technology for data transmission.

Rice farming technique for water scarcity.
Measurement accuracy of the laser distance sensor.
Measuring range of the laser water level sensor.
The percentage of time the sensor node is active.
The percentage of time the sensor node is in power-saving mode.
The average productivity of rice in the Mekong Delta.
